title: Magnificently Flamed Ukrainian Beef Shin Stew
description: A hearty Ukrainian dish featuring beef shin, flambe, and a blend of cheeses, perfect for a post-workout meal. This stew is high in protein and rich in flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef shin pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the flambe sauce and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours.
Stir in the shredded cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with a dollop of sour cream if desired.
